conflictOfInterest.details: The reviewer principal (github:VSBDev) is the same as the lesson author principal (github:VSBDev). Under the adopted site/agent/quorum-policy.json founding stage policy, a single operator is permitted to run all review and adjudication agents.

findings.finding: Verified the total criteria score alignment: 4 (item-describe-journey) + 3 (item-explain-relevance) + 3 (item-identify-capabilities) = 10 total rubric criteria. The manual checkbox controls rendered by site/lesson-reader.js map correctly to each item criterion, and the overall check correctly counts completion out of 10 criteria.

Verified that checking manual controls in the reader UI does not affect canonical answer correctness, save state, or record progress, maintaining the clear boundary between self-report and automatic scoring.

Verified that all material claims map accurately to their source notes in the lesson content and resolve to course/PREMED-SYLLABUS.md at the frozen commit afc8b980e1181d172b0954b7b46bfcdd32d0db85, covering syllabus module WEL-000, recommended sequence, capabilities, and boundaries.

limitations: Review was executed by an AI agent under the academic review protocol.
Physical check of local files only; no external network resource was accessed.
Validation of the lesson reader is limited to compliance with its manual scoring interface design.
